tool_args.label: Key Performance Metrics - March 2025
tool_args.raw_text: NEW YORK CITY TRANSIT KEY PERFORMANCE METRICS March 2025

payload.title: Key Performance Metrics
payload.description: Key Performance Metrics report prepared for the March 2025 meeting of the New York City Transit & Bus Committee

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Demetrius Crichlow, President of New York City Transit
tool_args.raw_text: Demetrius Crichlow President New York City Transit

warnings: entity.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names are relation context.

tool_args.label: New York City Transit
tool_args.raw_text: New York City Transit and MTA Bus operate all subways and buses in New York City.

tool_args.label: Metropolitan Transportation Authority
tool_args.raw_text: The Metropolitan Transportation Authority is North America's largest transportation network

tool_args.label: New York City Police Department
tool_args.raw_text: NYPD continues to enforce laws, rules, and regulations within the transit system

tool_args.label: Rockaway Resiliency Project
tool_args.raw_text: Our shuttle train has been operating at 99% on-time performance since January. Our free shuttle bus operation, on and off the peninsula, is second to none.

payload.description: Shuttle train and free shuttle bus operation serving the Rockaway peninsula while the bridge is closed

tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign
tool_args.raw_text: Back in January, we approved the implementation of the Queens Bus Network Redesign. Organizing the Queens Bus Network is no easy feat.

payload.description: Redesign of Queens bus network, rolling out in two phases at end of June and end of August

tool_args.label: Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE)
tool_args.raw_text: New York City Transit launched Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE), a program designed to speed up buses, improving safety, accessibility, and reliability.

payload.description: Program issuing tickets for double parking, blocking bus stops, and driving in bus lanes via bus-mounted cameras

tool_args.label: West 28th Street Substation
tool_args.raw_text: We've been building a new substation under West 28th Street. The entire project will be completed by the end of this year.

payload.description: New power substation under West 28th Street to support CBTC signal upgrades on the 8th Avenue Line

tool_args.label: CRZ Timepoint Pilot
tool_args.raw_text: The CRZ Timepoint Pilot launched last month to evaluate whether removing timepoints can enhance route performance and service efficiency has shown promising outcomes.

payload.description: Pilot evaluating removal of timepoints on seven selected routes to enhance route performance and service efficiency in the Congestion Relief Zone

tool_args.label: R211T open gangway cars placed on G line
tool_args.raw_text: Earlier this month, we announced the placement of two new R211T open gangway cars on the G line.

payload.description: Placement of two new R211T open gangway subway cars on the Crosstown G line

tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign Phase 1
tool_args.raw_text: We will launch a large-scale public education campaign leading up to implementation of the new bus network, which will roll out in two phases at the end of June and the end of August.

payload.description: Phase 1 rollout of the Queens Bus Network Redesign

tool_args.label: Queens Bus Network Redesign Phase 2
tool_args.raw_text: which will roll out in two phases at the end of June and the end of August.

payload.description: Phase 2 rollout of the Queens Bus Network Redesign

tool_args.label: NaviLens installation on 6 line subway cars
tool_args.raw_text: Work is underway to install NaviLens codes on 6 line subway cars. All cars on the 6 line are expected to feature NaviLens codes this spring.

payload.description: Installation of NaviLens wayfinding codes on 6 line subway cars

tool_args.label: ACE expansion to two new Manhattan routes
tool_args.raw_text: Coming this April, we will expand Automated Camera Enforcement to two new routes in Manhattan.

payload.description: Expand Automated Camera Enforcement to two new routes in Manhattan

tool_args.label: CRZ Timepoint Pilot launch
tool_args.raw_text: The CRZ Timepoint Pilot launched last month

payload.description: Launch of CRZ Timepoint Pilot to evaluate removing timepoints on seven selected routes

tool_args.label: Bx19
tool_args.raw_text: On the Bx19, travel speeds increased by 12% and collisions along the route saw a decrease of 20% since the cameras were turned on.

tool_args.label: Q69
tool_args.raw_text: the Q69 saw a 22% gain along Queens Plaza

tool_args.label: M101
tool_args.raw_text: the M101 has sped up by 25% on 3rd Avenue

tool_args.label: Reduced-Fare OMNY adoption 55%
tool_args.raw_text: More than 55% of Reduced-Fare customers are now using OMNY.

tool_args.label: 1.3 million OMNY cards mailed
tool_args.raw_text: From December to January, we mailed over 1.3 million OMNY cards to existing Reduced-Fare MetroCard customers.

tool_args.label: February 2025 bus average speed 8.2 mph
tool_args.raw_text: Bus Speed averaged 8.2 mph, consistent with last month and 1.2% faster than February 2024.

tool_args.label: Subway weekday OTP 82.2% February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: In February 2025, weekday On-Time Performance (OTP) was 82.2%

tool_args.label: Subway weekend OTP 85.7% February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Weekend OTP was 85.7%, just 1% below January and above our goal of 84%.

tool_args.label: Subway CJTP 84.8% February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: The percentage of customers arriving at their destinations within five minutes of schedule (CJTP) remained steady at 84.8%

tool_args.label: Subway service delivered 92.8% February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Service Delivered was 92.8%, a 0.8% improvement from January.

tool_args.label: Bus service delivered 96.5% February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Service Delivered was 96.5%, reflecting a 1.2% increase from February 2024 and matching January 2025.

tool_args.label: Bus CJTP 73.5% February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Customer Journey Time Performance (CJTP) was 73.5% in February

tool_args.label: Bus customer satisfaction 60% February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: 60% of bus customers were satisfied with service, consistent with January 2025.

tool_args.label: Subway weekday paid ridership 3.91M February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: February weekday paid subway ridership rose from January to 3.91 million.

tool_args.label: Bus weekday paid ridership 1.41M February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: weekday paid ridership of 1.41 million, up 13.4% from February 2024

tool_args.label: ACE citywide speed increase 5%
tool_args.raw_text: Citywide, ACE has brought a 5% increase to speeds on top of the gains delivered by bus lanes and busways.

tool_args.label: CBD Tolling Program showing positive trends for bus speeds
tool_args.raw_text: launch of the CBD Tolling Program (CBDTP), which continues to demonstrate positive trends, including increased bus speeds and more reliable service

payload.claim_text: The launch of the CBD Tolling Program continues to demonstrate positive trends, including increased bus speeds and more reliable service.
payload.description: Claim that CBD Tolling Program has improved bus speeds and reliability

tool_args.label: NaviLens nearly 13,000 uses in February
tool_args.raw_text: We are thrilled to report nearly 13,000 uses of NaviLens in February alone.

payload.claim_text: We are thrilled to report nearly 13,000 uses of NaviLens in February alone.

tool_args.label: NYC buses are the slowest in the nation
tool_args.raw_text: It's no secret that New York City's buses are the slowest in the nation.

payload.claim_text: It's no secret that New York City's buses are the slowest in the nation.
payload.description: Claim that NYC buses are the slowest in the US

tool_args.label: ACE recidivism rate declined to 7%
tool_args.raw_text: As of January, that rate has declined by three percentage points, with only 7% of violators being recidivists.

payload.claim_text: As of January, that rate has declined by three percentage points, with only 7% of violators being recidivists.
payload.description: ACE recidivism rate decreased from 10% to 7%

tool_args.label: ACE planned expansion to 60 additional routes by 2027
tool_args.raw_text: Between 2025 and 2027, New York City Transit plans to enforce 800 additional miles of roadway on 60 additional bus routes.

payload.claim_text: Between 2025 and 2027, New York City Transit plans to enforce 800 additional miles of roadway on 60 additional bus routes. 30 new routes are scheduled to be added in 2025 alone.

tool_args.label: Automated Camera Enforcement (ACE) bus-mounted cameras
tool_args.raw_text: By issuing tickets to violations committed through double parking, blocking bus stops, and driving in dedicated bus lanes and busways, ACE will clear the path ahead for our bus operators and improve service.

payload.description: Bus-mounted cameras that issue tickets for double parking, blocking bus stops, and driving in dedicated bus lanes and busways

tool_args.label: R211T open gangway cars placed on G line
tool_args.raw_text: this month DOS put two R-211T open-gangway trains into service on the G line

tool_args.label: NYPD is primary policing agency in NYCT subway system
tool_args.raw_text: As the primary policing agency in the NYCT subway system, the NYPD continues to enforce laws, rules, and regulations within the transit system.

tool_args.label: Major Felony Crime down 16% vs February 2024
tool_args.raw_text: Major Felony Crime was down 9% month-over-month and down 16% versus February 2024.

tool_args.label: Paratransit ridership 773,000 completed trips February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: Paratransit saw a total ridership of nearly 1.1 million riders on a total of 773,000 completed trips.

tool_args.label: Paratransit increase 16% vs February 2024
tool_args.raw_text: This represents an increase of 16% compared to February 2024.

tool_args.label: Paratransit broker OTP 95% February 2025
tool_args.raw_text: On broker service, we completed 95% of trips within the 20-minute pickup window from promise time, up 4% from last year and exceeding our goal of 94%.
